name: mag-website-dev
description: Local dev tooling for the My Autism Gifts static site. Netlify publishes from repo root directly — no build step.

scripts.dev: browser-sync start --server . --files "*.html" "css/**/*" "js/**/*" "partials/**/*" "images/**/*" --no-notify --port 3000 --ignore node_modules --ignore .git --ignore dist --ignore .claude --ignore "Python Scripts" --ignore "JavaScript Scripts"
